calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Successor Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon expressed concern with having to go back and reconstruct records when Ms. Mix should have all of the records, stated that the property sold in foreclosure, that the loans on the property were taken out by the Decedent, that the property should have been automically paid off and that he ascertained that there was nothing left to probate. The Court stated that if Mr. Ferdon was satisfied that he could file a petition to close the estate due to lack of assets. The Order to Show Cause was taken off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Continued To Apr-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steve Weinkauf for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA). Sari Mix (Former Administrator) in pro per.

The Court stated that this matter was on for a transfer of assets to the SFPA. Mr. Weinkauf stated that Mr. Ferdon and Ms. Mix have talked, that there was $46,000.00 as of the date of death, and that the real property was forclosed on. Ms. Mix confirmed for the Court that there was no money in the Estate. Mr. Weinkauf stated that the property was $100,000.00 short on the sale, that they could do some type of report if nothing else, and that they need the bank statements/info from Washington Mutual. Ms. Mix stated that she had the account number, that the account was transferred to Chase, that there was no money in the account so it was closed, and that she does have the foreclosure documents. The Court instructed Ms. Mix to turn all of the documents to the SFPA keeping copies for herself if she wished and directed her to get the bank statements beginning from the date of death. Ms. Mix stated that since she wasn't the Administrator that the bank might not give her the documents. The Court instructed her to ask the bank for the documents and that if they don't turn them over then it would be up to the SFPA to get them. The Court continued the matter to April 27, 2010 and stated that if all the documents were turned over to the SFPA the matter would go off calendar; no appearance required.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Nici Rodich, CSR #11604. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauff for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court noted that Sari Mix was not present and stated that previous Orders To Show Cause regarding supsension of powers of the Administrator (Sari Mix) and removal of Ms. Mix had been issued. The Court ordered Sari Mix is removed as the Administrator of the Estate of Robert Lawrence Mix (order to be prepared by the Court). The Public Administrator is appointed as the Successor Administrator (Mr. Wienkauff is to prepare the order). Mr. Weinkauff stated that the real property was foreclosed on and that the only asset was a bank account with a balance of $25,000.00. The Court will look into issuance of an Order to Show Cause re: contempt.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The Court noted that Sari Mix was not present and that Attorney Lillian Ng was relieved as Counsel on December 23, 2009. An Order to Show Cause was also issued to Ms. Mix to appear and explain why she had not filed the Petition for Final Distribution and the possibility of suspension of powers. There being no appearance by Ms. Mix, the Court ordered Sari Mix' powers as the Administrator of the Estate Robert Lawrence Mix suspended. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to Sari Mix to appear and explain why he/she should not be removed as the Administrator of the Estate of Robert Lawrence Mix for failure to file the Petition for Final Distribution. The return date is February 24, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Sari Mix fails to appear, she will be removed and the Public Administrator will be appointed as Successor Administrator. Mr. Ferdon expressed concern about Ms. Ng being relieved as Counsel stating that when the Administrator fails to file the accounting, that the responsibilty would fall on the Attorney, that there was no bond and that the Public Administrator could not go after the cash assets.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR#12891. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Sari Mix.

Ms. Ng stated that she had no contact with Ms. Mix. The Court granted the Motion To Be Relieved as Counsel (signing the order for the same in open court). An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator Sari Mix to appear and explain why she has failed to file the Petition for Final Distribution. The return date is January 27, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204. If the Petition for Final Distribution is not filed at least 3 court days prior to the hearing date, the Administrator's powers may be suspended.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Dec-09-2009 Continued To Dec-23-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Continued To Sep-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
